description: Phase 16 scan_audit_summary persistent_failures: no claim id may appear red in >=3 of the last 5 audit entries, and no scanner may appear fail in >=3 of the last 5. Catches systemic unresolved failures (a flaky test that flips green once doesn't trip; genuinely broken scanners do).
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_audit_summary.json ] && jq -r "if ((.persistent_failures.red_claims_last_5 | length) == 0) and ((.persistent_failures.fail_scanners_last_5 | length) == 0) then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_audit_summary.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
